expectations.text: Each tier has at least one gate the previous tier doesn't (uat strictly stricter than develop, main strictly stricter than uat)
expectations.evidence: Matrix shows uat adds integration/e2e/UAT smoke required vs. develop; main adds production smoke and change-management metadata vs. uat.

expectations.text: Lint, typecheck, unit tests, build artifact are required at all three tiers
expectations.evidence: All four rows show 'required' across develop, uat, main columns.

expectations.text: Integration tests and end-to-end tests are required at uat and main (optional or deferred on develop)
expectations.evidence: Integration tests row: optional/required/required. E2E row: optional/required/required.

expectations.text: Environment smoke tests at uat run against the UAT deployed environment; environment smoke tests at main run against production
expectations.evidence: Separate rows: 'UAT environment smoke tests' (n/a/required/required) and 'Production environment smoke tests' (n/a/n/a/required); body explicitly says smoke tests run against the deployed UAT and production environments.

expectations.text: Justification given for why slower gates (e2e) are gated at uat rather than per-merge on develop (cost-benefit)
expectations.evidence: 'Why integration / e2e are optional on develop' and the e2e section: 'develop tip sees many merges per day. Running the integration suite per-merge is expensive and noisy... cost-benefit'.

expectations.text: Source-ref check is required at uat and main (optional on develop)
Source-ref check, if mentioned at develop, accepts feature/* and integration/* but rejects uat or main as source refs
expectations.evidence: 'If you mention source-ref enforcement on develop... it should accept feature/* and integration/* as valid sources and reject uat or main'.

expectations.text: Output reads as a matrix (table or per-tier list), not as a flat list of all gates
expectations.evidence: Top of output is a matrix table; 'Per-tier list (alternate view)' provides per-tier reading as well.

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name
